patch:
diff --git a/internal/review/live_resource_hook.go b/internal/review/live_resource_hook.go
--- a/internal/review/live_resource_hook.go
+++ b/internal/review/live_resource_hook.go
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 package review
 
 // LiveResourceHook is an allowlisted one-line edit target for codebase-dag live runs.
 // Real DeepSeek patches should change only this constant to keep unified diffs small.
-const LiveResourceHook = "resource-hook-v1"
+const LiveResourceHook = "hook-v2"
